---
name: Feature request / improvement
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the app
labels: enhancement
---

## Before you submit

Please use this template for new ideas, improvements, or feature requests.
If your request is related to the beta branch, mention that clearly below.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues first.
- [ ] I explained the problem or use case clearly.
- [ ] I mentioned whether this affects the beta branch, stable release, or both.
- [ ] I included any relevant screenshots or logs if they help explain the request.

## Summary

What would you like to improve or add?

## Problem or use case

What problem does this solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered other solutions or workarounds?

## Beta / stable impact

Does this request apply to the beta branch, stable release, or both?

## Additional context

Add any other relevant details, screenshots, or examples.
